claim_boundary: Local deterministic evidence only; skill efficacy fixtures are structural/local evidence, not live pass-rate, empirical before/after performance, external popularity, adoption, marketplace availability, or market claim evidence.

promoted golden case.meaning: Human-reviewed case admitted to regression coverage.

runtime telemetry sample.meaning: Actual runtime fact sample; may still require human review.

structural fixture.meaning: Local deterministic structure sample passed; not evidence of live task success.
